g.aria-label: Gradient legend titled 'Proportion' for fill color with values from 0.0 to 1.0
Title text 'Document-topic proportions after Gibbs sampling'
X-axis titled 'Inferred topic' for a discrete scale with 3 values: topic 0, topic 1, topic 2
Y-axis titled 'Document' for a discrete scale with 15 values: doc 00 (true 0), doc 01 (true 0), doc 02 (true 0), doc 03 (true 0), doc 04 (true 0), ending with doc 14 (true 2)
